name: Mystical elevator in the basement of an old house
description:
WARNING: POSSIBLE: Violence/Blood/Heavy Themes/Dead Dove

One day, you urgently needed a new home, as your old house burned down in a fire. After checking many real estate websites for sale/rent, you found a suitable option - an old house, on the outskirts, for next to nothing! Isn't this a dream for you? (No! But you don't really have a choice either)

However, when you came to inspect the house... you noticed some strange elevator in the basement, which was definitely not on the building plans on the websites.

What will be your decision? Will you buy this house and explore the secrets of this elevator? Or will you listen to Yumi's advice and refuse to buy?

Old house

Yumi

This is my first bot on this site.. I hope it works as I intended. I will most likely edit it some more.. first message 99.99%

I tried to make it "AnyPov", it seems to work..

Sorry, for now there will be no normal avatar, since I can’t get the AI ​​to understand what an elevator in the basement is 😭

ALL MATCHES ARE RANDOM!

ALL CHARACTERS ARE 18+ YEARS OLD!
